title: BMBL Free Cash Flow Trends and Operational Metrics
text: In Q3 2024, Bumble generated $92 million in free cash flow. For a broader view, Bumble's total free cash flow for the trailing twelve months (TTM) ended in Sep. 2024 was $167 million. Cash and cash equivalents stood at $252 million at the end of Q3. Additionally, the company repurchased $90 million of stock in Q3, with a total of $361 million returned to shareholders since the inception of the buyback program. The full-year 2024 revenue outlook was $1.066 billion to $1.072 billion, representing growth of 1.6% at the midpoint. The company exceeded its adjusted EBITDA expectations for Q3, demonstrating strong operational focus. However, Q4 2024 revenue was projected at $256 million to $262 million, representing a 5% year-over-year decline at the midpoint. Strong free cash flow generation demonstrates the company's ability to return capital to shareholders even as it navigates near-term revenue challenges.
